text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Daaang... Well, gotta keep your chin up, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No, no, no. It's really not a big deal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: If it were easy, arcades would go out of business.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it. Why don't we grab some
ramen on the way home?
